channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fugitive Arrested After Returning to Italy to Watch Olympics 2026
item.description: The Slovakian hockey team had one less fan in the bleachers at the 2026 Olympics. A Slovak national was arrested Feb. 11 in Milan over a warrant issue...

item.title: Bath & Body Works x Disney Princess' Magical Collection Is Out Now!
item.description: It's time to step into a world of wonder and imagination with Bath & Body Works and Disney, because the brand new Princess collection is out now! Bath...

item.title: Jeopardy! Contestant Hilariously Predicts Downfall of Other Contestant

item.title: Apple Martin Reveals the One Cosmetic Procedure She's Had Done
item.description: Apple Martin is being supremely honest about her past beauty regimen. The daughter of Gwyneth Paltrow and Coldplay frontman Chris Martin addressed onl...

item.title: How Hailey Bieber, Justin Bieber Share Responsibilities of Son Jack
item.description: Hailey Bieber knows her baby is in good hands when she’s away. Indeed, the model—who shares son Jack Blues, 17 months, with husband Justin Bieber—shar...

item.title: Britney Spears Seen Out for First Time Since Selling Music Catalog
item.description: Britney Spears is carrying on as if nothing happened ... spotted doing everyday errands like she didn’t just cash in one of the most iconic catalogs i...

item.title: 'Love Island' Jeremiah Brown Says Valentine's Day Looks 'Bleak' for Him
item.description: Looks like Jeremiah Brown’s "Love Island" luck didn’t follow him back to the mainland ... 'cause he tells us his Valentine’s Day is shaping up to be a...

item.title: Stefon Diggs Pleads Not Guilty Assaulting Chef Days After Super Bowl
item.description: Stefon Diggs appeared in court on Friday for his arraignment over the alleged assault of his personal chef, with the NFL star pleading not guilty just...

item.title: Cop Pulls Woman From Burning Vehicle After Carjacking Crash, on Video
item.description: Police in Florida saved a woman from a burning car in the nick of time ... after an alleged carjacker stole another vehicle with a baby inside and cra...

item.title: Influencer Yonna Jay Says Streaming Is Replacing TV
item.description: Television is going the way of the dodo, a popular influencer says ... because streaming is on the way to usurp the old mass media technology. We caug...

item.title: Zootopia 2’s Record-Breaking Box Office Run Is About To Lose Its Advantage
